message: High RC score (82) but key zone quality is weak (Weak/38, Weak/41).
suggested_fix: Cap RC score when key zones are weak/insufficient; structure clarity should not read high on thin levels.

message: RC score jumped 42 points since the previous confirmed bar (80 -> 38).
suggested_fix: Smooth the headline score or confirm a real structural change drove it; avoid jumpy reads.
Lower the state to Mixed/Weak, or re-check the score caps.

message: Support zone is stale but still marked strong (quality Fresh, score 85).
suggested_fix: Decay/expire stale zones; a stale zone must not read Fresh/Tested or score high.

message: Support zone has only 1 touch(es) but is treated as strong.
suggested_fix: Require >= 2 clean touches (or strong reaction) before a zone reads strong.

message: Support and resistance are only 0.27% apart (overlap/duplicate).
suggested_fix: Merge or de-duplicate near-identical zones; keep the stronger one.

message: High RC score (76) while regime is Chop.
suggested_fix: Cap RC score in chop; choppy structure should not read clear.

message: No key support or resistance present.
suggested_fix: Fall back to a subtle structure level, or surface Insufficient Structure.
Move extra rows to Advanced; keep the default surface compact.
Cap drawn zones; show only the nearest 1-2 per side.
Confirm Location reads 'Above Range' / open-above, not a fabricated level.

message: Location "Near Support" but distance to support is -3.2% / 1.6 ATR (> 1.5% and > 1 ATR).
suggested_fix: Only emit "Near Support" within 1.5% or 1 ATR; otherwise use Lower Range.

message: Location state "Near Support" disagrees with range position 16 / 1.6 ATR (expected "Lower Range").
suggested_fix: Derive Location from range position AND proximity (% or ATR); keep one source of truth with the indicator.
Remove "avoid chase" from indicator output; use structure / location / regime / quality / clarity language only.
Remove "pullback zone" from indicator output; use structure / location / regime / quality / clarity language only.
